steps: 30 free minutes to understand your situation. We'll tell you honestly whether and how we can help.
Mapping your processes. We identify the tasks that cost the most time for the least expertise.
A concrete action plan with deliverables, timelines and prices. Everything fixed upfront, in writing.
We execute. Weekly check-ins, real-time progress access. You stay in control of the project.
Delivery, tool training, and performance monitoring. We stay with you after launch.

faq.label: FAQ
items: How long does it take to deliver an automation?
2 to 3 weeks after the audit. We commit to the date in writing and we deliver.
Which tools do you work with?
CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce), email, telephony, accounting. We plug into what you already have — no forced migration.
What if we don't have a CRM?
We set one up as part of the package if needed. Notion, Airtable or a classic CRM depending on your maturity.
Do we keep control of the system?
Yes. The code and workflows belong to you. No lock-in. If we part ways, you keep everything.
Do you charge by the hour?
No. Fixed setup fee + maintenance subscription. Clear, predictable, no surprises.
Do you only work in Paris?
Our base is in Paris but we work remotely across France and with French-speaking neighbours.
